name: todo
description: To-do list with checkable items; height auto-sizes from task count
css: #todo-widget { height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:1em; box-sizing:border-box; } #todo-widget .todo-title { font-size:clamp(1rem,6cqi,2rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--accent,#00ff41); margin-bottom:0.5em; letter-spacing:0.1em; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1)); padding-bottom:0.4em; } #todo-widget .todo-list { list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; flex:1; overflow:visible; } #todo-widget .todo-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6em; padding:0.4em 0; font-size:clamp(0.75rem,4cqi,1.1rem); color:var(--fg,#ccc); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } #todo-widget .todo-item.done .todo-text { text-decoration:line-through; opacity:0.4; } #todo-widget .todo-check { font-size:clamp(0.8rem,4.4cqi,1.2rem); width:1.2em; text-align:center; } #todo-widget .todo-item.done .todo-check { color:var(--accent,#00ff41); } #todo-widget .todo-item:not(.done) .todo-check { color:var(--fg-dim,#888); } #todo-widget .todo-summary { margin-top:0.6em; font-size:clamp(0.6rem,3.2cqi,0.9rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); text-align:right; border-top:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1)); padding-top:0.4em; }
